title: sphenopholis longiflora
intro: Sphenopholis longiflora, also known as the prairie sandreed, is a type of perennial grass native to the prairies of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Sphenopholis longiflora include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, and can also be dried and used in herbal infusions or capsule form.
